## IT274R ARCHIVED - Rental properties - Capital cost of $50,000 or more

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
This bulletin deals with the requirement to include in a separate capital cost allowance class each rental property acquired at a cost of $50,000 or more.
